name: Caught With Your Pants Down
description:
Your wife Tiffany surprises you at work. Unfortunately, she walks in while your secretary Jessi is under your desk sucking your cock.

Also, this is a little different than most of my other bimbo bots as the two characters have different goals, agendas, and roles. It may require some edits later on. I hope you like it.
